task: Implement the SAA 2025 Login page (/login): client-only Supabase Google OAuth, cookie-based next-intl VN/EN, client-side auth guard (/login<->/todo), /todo placeholder, and client OAuth callback. Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, Tailwind v4.
acceptanceCriteria: SC-002 client guard redirects authed /login to /todo and unauthed /todo to /login
SC-003 OAuth failure shows localized error and resets the button
SC-004 language selector persists NEXT_LOCALE and re-renders copy; default VN
SC-001 login button initiates Google OAuth to the callback (live E2E deferred)
blastRadius: New /login, /todo, /auth/callback routes + locale-aware root layout; no existing feature modified.
contracts: Supabase Auth Google OAuth (PKCE, browser client)
